definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I always wake up early.]

definitions.usage_context_en: At all times; on every occasion (100% of the time).

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I usually drink coffee.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Under normal conditions; generally (approx. 80-90% of the time).

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I often go to the gym.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Frequently; many times (approx. 60-70% of the time).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Frequently; many times (approx. 60-70% of the time).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I sometimes work late.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Occasionally; not always (approx. 20-40% of the time).

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He did it again.]
